{{Event Header|StS2 Wood Carvings.png}} {{E|Wood Carvings|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. == Options == {{Frame|Bird}} {{TS|positive||Choose 1 starter card to {{2|Transform}} into {{C|Peck||2}}.}}
{{Frame|Snake}} {{TS|positive||{{KW|Enchant||2}} 1 card with {{KW|Slither||2}}.}} (Locked if no cards can be enchanted with Slither)
{{Frame|Torus}} {{TS|positive||Choose 1 starter card to {{2|Transform}} into {{C|Toric Toughness||2}}.}} == Dialogue ==
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings: A bird, snake, and... a torus? A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?
{{Frame|Bird}}
You place the bird carving on the pedestal and the statue's EYES LIGHT UP and you hear a faint ringing within your mind. ...caw.... caw caaaawww... The pedestal opens and a strange fluid begins to pour out. Naturally, you drink it all.
{{Frame|Snake}}
You place the snake carving on the pedestal and the statue's SCALES LIGHT UP! You feel a bit warm, comfortable, and wobbly.
{{Frame|Torus}}
You place the torus carving on the pedestal and your STOMACH LIGHTS UP as the statue transforms into a piping hot fried confection. An insatiable hunger takes over and you quickly consume the donut. You feel tougher, but slower.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
